Maison de Parfum — Doha

The Shape of Silent Opulence.

Rare Cambodian agarwood, cured through two Gulf summers and decanted in heavy crystal.

Explore the Collection Compose a Bespoke Accord →
Est. 2026·Extrait de Parfum
Scroll
12 Twelve months of patience
before a single bottle is sealed.

Oud does not surrender its resin willingly. We do not hurry it.

Each tree is read by hand in the forests of Cambodia, graded by our master curator, and rested in Doha through two Gulf summers until the smoke turns from sharp to ceremonial — then married to Taif rose gathered at dawn.

The Collection

Four Allocations

Decanted in strictly limited quantities. When a harvest is exhausted, the allocation closes.

I
Discovery Set · 5 × 10ml

Explore the Oud Journey

The golden evolution of Eastern oud, in five travelling extraits.

TopEarthy Saffron, Spiced Cardamom, Bergamot
HeartTaif Rose, Velvet Jasmine, Warm Cedarwood
BaseCambodian Oud, Creamy Sandalwood, Ambergris
ConcentrationExtrait · 25%
Format5 × 10ml

II
Signature · 100ml Decanter

12oud Signature

Aged Cambodian agarwood, cured eighteen months. Our masterpiece.

TopKashmir Saffron, Fresh Nutmeg, Royal Lavender

BaseImperial Cambodian Oud, Amber, White Musk
ConcentrationExtrait · 30%
Longevity14+ Hours

Private Reserve · 100ml + 15ml

The Maison
“Twelve months of patience.
One singular accord.”
I — Harvest

Cambodia

Agarwood read and graded by hand, by families who have known the wood for generations.

II — Cure

Doha

Eighteen months of rest through two Gulf summers, until the resin darkens and turns ceremonial.

III — Decant

The Atelier

Married to Taif rose and sealed by hand into heavy geometric crystal.

Corporate & Diplomatic Gifting

Commissioned Originally for Regional Royal Delegations.

Enquire via Concierge
The Bespoke Atelier

Compose an Accord That Answers Only to You.

Not an online form — an appointment. Your formula is rested, then sealed under your own name.
